analysis_plan.next_if_usable: use center to plan Ramsey/T2star on image231924_c01

metadata.execute_route_policy: verified intent plus pre-enqueue advisory before managed single-item execute; pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1 route just completed successfully for strong-pi pODMR.
metadata.frequency_window_reason: 40 MHz weak-pi window centered on the strong-pi rough center 3.8792 GHz covers the +/-6 MHz screen-grade uncertainty and possible drift while keeping 25 points per human guidance.
metadata.acquisition_reason: 4 averages x 50000 repetitions gives 200000 weak-pi shots, preserves even snake-order averaging, and limits the per-average tracking window in light of strong-pi drift flags.
metadata.drift_context: The preceding strong-pi pODMR had all 4 averages flagged for common-mode brightness drift under snake order; this is advisory provenance, so the weak-pi design keeps a bounded 25-point, 4-average, 50000-repetition scan rather than increasing per-average window.
comparison_targets: strong-pi pODMR retry: visible 23-25% resonance dip near 3.879 GHz
human advice: after one aligned NV is found, focus on that NV and use about 20-30 points initially
NV memory: weak-pi pODMR required before precision mw_freq_hz claims
metadata.sequence_readout_roles: full_expt=0 path has two detections: readout 1 mS=0 reference; readout 2 post-pulse signal.
